title: helianthemum nummularium var. scopolii
intro: Helianthemum nummularium var. scopolii, also known as rockrose, is a sub-species of a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Helianthemum nummularium var. scopolii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for the extraction and utilization of its medicinal compounds.
